expectations.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
expectations.evidence: Full retrieval pipeline executed; resolved vault path, enumerated SQLDelight pages, read two concept pages, also grounded against existing Conversations.sq in the repo.

expectations.text: Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
expectations.evidence: Query 'SQLDelight asFlow mapToList coroutines dispatcher requirements' matches routing table verbatim.

expectations.text: Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Cites 'SQLDelight Coroutines and Flow Integration.md' and 'SQLDelight .sq Schema Files and Code Generation.md'. Incorporates 2.x dispatcher requirement and table-listener mechanism from those pages.

expectations.text: Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
expectations.evidence: End-to-end walkthrough covering schema (.sq), repository asFlow().mapToList(IO), ViewModel stateIn, and Composable collectAsStateWithLifecycle. Also flags 2.x gotcha and write-through-same-driver requirement.
